channel.title: KRONATRIX Authors
channel.description: Author websites, book promotion and AI visibility for authors.

item.title: How to Market Your Book | Author Websites & AI Visibility | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: Learn how to market your book with a clear author website, book landing page, reader proof, Google visibility and AI search visibility. Get a Free Author AI Visibility Check from KRONATRIX Authors.

item.title: KRONATRIX Authors | Author Websites, Book Promotion Pages & AI Visibility
item.description: KRONATRIX Authors builds author websites, ebook websites, book landing pages and AI-readable book promotion pages for writers, indie authors and novelists.

item.title: Free Author AI Visibility Check | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: Request a Free Author AI Visibility Check to see whether Google and AI chats can clearly understand your author name, book, genre and website.

item.title: Sample Author AI Visibility Check Report | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: View a sample Free Author AI Visibility Check report showing author clarity, book title clarity, genre clarity, crawlability, proof and recommended fixes.

item.title: Author AI Visibility Check Sample Report | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: A sample report showing how KRONATRIX Authors reviews author name clarity, book title clarity, genre clarity, Google visibility and AI-readable context.

item.title: Author Website Examples, Ebook Pages & Book Promotion Websites | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: See examples of author websites, ebook websites, book landing pages and book promotion websites built by KRONATRIX Authors.

item.title: Author Website Service for Writers | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: Professional author websites for writers, indie authors, self-published authors and novelists who need clearer book marketing, proof and AI search visibility.

item.title: Book Promotion Website for Authors | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: Book promotion websites that make one book easier to understand, trust and buy with clear copy, buy links, proof and AI-readable structure.

item.title: Ebook Website Service | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: Ebook websites built for authors who want a clean page for an ebook, lead magnet, sample chapter or full book promotion campaign.

item.title: Book Landing Page for Authors | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: Book landing pages for authors who need one clear page for social traffic, ads, email, podcasts, book links and AI-readable book context.

item.title: Do Authors Need a Website? | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: Learn why authors need a website for credibility, reader trust, Google visibility, AI search clarity, email capture and book promotion.

item.title: How to Market a Novel Online | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: Learn how to market a novel online using a clear book page, genre positioning, reader hooks, social content, proof and AI search visibility.

item.title: How to Advertise Your Novel | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: Learn how to advertise your novel without wasting attention by sending readers to a clear, trusted and AI-readable book landing page.

item.title: How to Get Your Book Found on Google | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: Get your book found on Google with a crawlable author website, dedicated book page, metadata, schema, proof and consistent public mentions.

item.title: How to Get Your Book Recommended by AI | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: Help AI chats understand and recommend your book with clear author facts, book facts, genre clarity, proof and AI-readable website structure.

item.title: AI Search for Authors | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: AI search for authors explained: what AI chats need to understand about your author name, book title, genre, reader audience and proof.

item.title: Google SEO for Authors | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: Google SEO for authors using clear author pages, book pages, metadata, internal links, structured data and helpful content.

item.title: Author Website vs Amazon Author Page | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: Compare an author website with an Amazon author page and learn why authors usually need both for stronger control, visibility and reader trust.

item.title: Book Website vs Link in Bio | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: Compare a book website with a link in bio and learn why authors need more than a list of links to market a book seriously.

item.title: Author Website SEO Checklist | KRONATRIX Authors
item.description: A practical SEO checklist for author websites covering titles, metadata, schema, book pages, internal links, proof and crawlability.
